chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. A. No. S- 522 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of Main Case 16-01-2023 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Buriro, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Channa, Advocate for the respondent No.3. Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Learned counsel for the applicant, under instructions, does not press the instant Crl. Misc. Application, which stands dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Ahmad
